title: Permits for renewable energy batteries
doc_html:
CHAPTER 12. RENEWABLE ENERGY

PART I. BATTERIES

§1131. Permits for renewable energy batteries

            A. No battery used for renewable energy storage facilities shall be installed without the operator first obtaining a permit for installation from the Department of Conservation and Energy.

            B. No permit shall be issued without proof of financial security and a decommissioning plan.

            C. The secretary shall promulgate and adopt such rules and regulations as are necessary to implement this Section by August 31, 2026.

            D. Nothing in this Section shall be construed to apply to renewable energy storage for residential property use.

            Acts 2025, No. 279, §1.
doc_text:
CHAPTER 12.  RENEWABLE ENERGY
PART I.  BATTERIES
§1131.  Permits for renewable energy batteries
A.  No battery used for renewable energy storage facilities shall be installed without
the operator first obtaining a permit for installation from the Department of Conservation and
Energy.
B.  No permit shall be issued without proof of financial security and a
decommissioning plan.
C.  The secretary shall promulgate and adopt such rules and regulations as are
necessary to implement this Section by August 31, 2026.
D.  Nothing in this Section shall be construed to apply to renewable energy storage
for residential property use.
Acts 2025, No. 279, §1.
